title: Bethuadahari Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Bethuadahari Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of West Bengal

overview.short: Bethuadahari Wildlife Sanctuary is situated in the Bethuadahari town (Nakashipara area) of Nadia District, West Bengal, India.
overview.description: Bethuadahari Wildlife Sanctuary is situated in the Bethuadahari town (Nakashipara area) of Nadia District, West Bengal, India. The sanctuary is located beside National Highway 12 (old no NH 34). The sanctuary covers 67 hectares, and was established in 1980 to preserve a portion of the central Gangetic alluvial zone.

topPlaces.name: Bethuadahri
topPlaces.description: Bethuadahari is a town in the Nakashipara CD block in the Krishnanagar Sadar subdivision of the Nadia district of the state of West Bengal, India. It is almost 28 km from the district headquarters Krishnanagar.

topPlaces.name: Jagadanandapur
topPlaces.description: Jagadanandapur is a census town in the Nakashipara CD block in the Krishnanagar Sadar subdivision of the Nadia district in the Indian state of West Bengal, and the town is part of Bethuadahari 1 G.P.

topPlaces.name: Kamarhati, Nadia
topPlaces.description: Kamarhati is a village in Krishnanagar II CD Block in Krishnanagar Sadar subdivision of Nadia district of West Bengal, India beside Dhubulia. Most of the people in this village are Hindu in religion.

topPlaces.name: Banagram, Kamarhati, Nadia
topPlaces.description: Banagram is a small locality or village in Krishnanagar II CD Block in Krishnanagar Sadar subdivision of Nadia district of West Bengal, India beside Kamarhati, Nadia. Three Hindu Temple, one monastery, Banagram Radha Madhob Seba Ashram are there.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bethuadahari Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bethuadahari Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Bethuadahari Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose International Airport, Kolkata (105 km) and the nearest railway station is Howrah Junction (Kolkata) (113 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bethuadahari Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bethuadahari Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bethuadahari Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Bethuadahari Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Bethuadahari Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kshidirpur, Bethuadahri, Jagadanandapur, Nakashipara, Nakashipara (community development block).
